en: Steak knife, you get the urge.
ko: 스테이크 나이프, 찌르고 싶은 충동이 생겨.

en: I do, that I want to stab.
I want to stab with it, you know? Really? Yeah, because you pick up a baseball bat, you want to swing it.
ko: 찌르고 싶어, 알지? 정말? 응, 야구 방망이를 들면 휘두르고 싶잖아.

en: You pick up a tennis ball, you want to throw it.
When you have a knife, you want to stab, do you not? Yeah, a little bit. Huh? You know what this should have? What should it have?
ko: 칼을 들면 찌르고 싶지 않니? 응, 조금. 뭐? 이건 뭐가 있어야 할까? 뭐가 있어야 해?

en: Yeah, a stabbing range where you stab dummies. Wow. You feel good, you feel good. Where would the stabbing range be?
ko: 응, 더미를 찌르는 찌르기 공간. 와. 기분이 좋고, 기분이 좋고. 찌르기 공간은 어디에 있을까?

en: In the valley. What do you think, Marilyn?
The knife, you feel like stabbing somebody?
Yeah, I feel like stabbing someone. Interesting.
This is fantastic food. Thank you. It really is.
ko: 이건 환상적인 음식이야. 고마워. 정말 그래.

en: Yeah, I can never get my potatoes like that.
ko: 난 절대 이렇게 감자를 만들 수 없어.

en: Really good. What is this, tap? Yes, it is. No filter?
ko: 정말 맛있어. 이건 수돗물? 응, 맞아. 필터 없어?

en: Interesting, I'm surprised you don't have a filter. You have no filter.
ko: 흥미롭네, 필터가 없다는 게 놀라워. 필터가 없어.
